---
title: "Reviews"
description: "Retours sur des livres, cours et ressources — tech, business, data science."
listing:
  contents: "*.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 2
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories]
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---
